summary: Iteration 2 tested new features (GitHub contribution heatmap + light/dark theme toggle) plus full regression. All 8 backend pytest cases pass. All frontend flows pass on desktop and mobile viewports. Contribution API returns 365 days with correct schema and is cached (2nd call <1.5s). Heatmap renders 365 cells, month labels JUL..JUN, 'contributions' header, and less→more legend. Theme toggle flips data-theme='light'/'dark' on <html>, persists across reload via localStorage['theme'], and works from both desktop (theme-toggle) and mobile (theme-toggle-mobile) buttons. Contact form still submits successfully in light mode with success toast.
passed: GET /api/github/contributions -> 200, username=anshyadav669, total_last_year=4 (int), yearly_totals dict, days array length=365, each entry has date/count/level (level 0-4)
Second call to /api/github/contributions is cached (<1.5s round trip)
Regression: /api/, /api/github/stats, /api/leetcode/stats, /api/codechef/stats, POST/GET /api/contact, 422 on invalid email - all pass
Desktop nav shows theme-toggle button; clicking flips data-theme dark <-> light
localStorage['theme'] persists across page reload (light stays light after F5)
Body bg in light mode = rgb(250,250,249) (off-white)
Mobile viewport (390x844) shows theme-toggle-mobile; clicking toggles theme (light -> dark verified)
ContributionHeatmap card [data-testid='github-contributions-card'] renders inside GitHub Stats section
Card shows '4 contributions' header, 'LESS' / 'MORE' legend, months JUL..JUN in order
Contact form submit in light mode returns success toast 'Message sent. I'll get back to you shortly.'
All existing testids (nav-*, project-card-0/1, contact-*-input, contact-submit-btn) still present
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: /app/frontend/src/App.js still hardcodes Toaster theme='dark' and dark background colors on the toast; toast card remains dark even in light mode. Not blocking, but consider syncing toaster theme with useTheme() for polish.
Minor: Mobile theme-toggle-mobile border uses border-ink-600 which is light-mode compatible via [data-theme='light'] overrides. Confirmed no contrast issues.
Positive: 30 min in-memory TTL cache correctly reused for the new /api/github/contributions endpoint; matches pattern of existing endpoints.
seed_data_creation: Two TEST contact messages inserted into Mongo (name='Iter2 UI' and 'Iter2 Light'). Safe to keep or clean up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend contribution endpoint uses github-contributions-api.jogruber.de (public, no auth) and is cached for 30 min. Contact submit button testid is 'contact-submit-btn' (NOT '-button'). Theme is applied by setting data-theme on <html> and toggling Tailwind dark class. Light-mode brand olive #4A7100 visible on 'Yadav.' heading; buttons stay lime #CCFF00. Toast still uses hardcoded dark styling (see critical_code_review_comments).
